items.caption_text:
A second income isn’t the opposite of enjoying life.

It’s what makes enjoying life **on your own terms** possible.

You don’t need to choose between living now and building.

You need to stop treating them like enemies.

Enjoyment without options isn’t freedom.

It’s just delayed panic.

items.caption_text:
Do you see circles or rectangles? Your answer reveals how your brain was wired — and why two people in the same job see completely different opportunities. Researchers studied this illusion across 14 countries. The results changed how I think about career growth. Your environment shapes what you're even capable of seeing. The good news? That can change. Comment what you see first. 👇
 
#MoneyMindset #CareerGrowth #MindsetShift
 
[career mindset, perception psychology, optical illusion career, money mindset India, why you can't see opportunities, career growth India, mindset rewiring, Indian professionals, carpentered world hypothesis, upbringing and career, career advice India, growth mindset, see opportunities differently, career perspective, neuroscience and career, mindset shift, Indian millennials career, career plateau, opportunity mindset, success mindset India]

items.caption_text:
India produces Himalayan pink salt. The world builds luxury spas out of it. We have almost none. In Europe, every spa has a salt cave. In the US, 2,000 facilities. In India — barely anything.
 
Setup: ₹6–20L. Cost per session: ₹200. Charge: ₹3,000. 5 sessions/day × 8 people = ₹1L/day. At 50% occupancy: ₹15L/month. Margins that don't exist anywhere else in wellness.
 
Comment "SALTCAVE" for the full blueprint — setup, suppliers, pricing, and pre-launch membership strategy.
 
#ComingSoonIndia #SideHustleIndia #BusinessIdeasIndia
 
[salt cave India, halotherapy India, salt spa India, Himalayan salt spa India, salt therapy India, side hustle India 2025, business ideas India, wellness business India, halotherapy business India, salt room India, respiratory therapy India, premium wellness India, entrepreneur India, solopreneur India, salt cave spa business, wellness startup India, low cost high margin business India, Bangalore wellness India]

India has Sarojini Nagar. The world has a ₹4 lakh crore secondhand fashion market. Nobody has made it cool in India yet.
 
No inventory. No stock. 35 vendors × ₹6K booth fee + 500 visitors × ₹400 entry = ₹3.5–4.5L per weekend. ₹1.5L cost. Pure profit from a rented warehouse and a good playlist.

items.caption_text:
#5 is the hardest for me right now 😭 This is the decade where small choices become your whole lifestyle. ✨

1. They manage access, not time.
Their calendar is protected because their attention is valuable. Not everyone gets a front-row seat to their mind.
2. They’re boring in the best way.
The glow-up isn’t a mood, it’s repetition. Same sleep window. Same workouts. Same money habits. Same work blocks.
3. They don’t argue with reality, they negotiate with it.
Not “this shouldn’t be happening” — but “what is this teaching me, and what’s my next move?”
4. They’re not always confident. They’re committed.
They’ve mastered showing up even when they feel messy, uncertain, or unprepared.
5. They treat energy like a resource, not a vibe.
Fewer late nights. Less chaos. Less people-pleasing. A calm nervous system is a power move.
6. They ask better questions.
Not “will this work?” but “what would make this work?” Not “is this risky?” but “what’s the cheapest way to test this?”
7. They’re obsessive about what they consume.
Not just food — content, conversations, music, news, even jokes. Mental junk quietly becomes your personality.
8. They don’t chase opportunities. They become referable.
Deliver on time. Follow through. Be easy to work with. Trust travels faster than talent.
9. They don’t confuse busy with valuable.
Power is choosing the one thing that moves everything, then doing it daily. Busy is often just avoidance wearing makeup.
10. They’re not afraid to outgrow people.
No drama. But it’s final. They choose environments that match their future, not their past.

items.caption_text:
Happy 30 days of posting to us! 

Today it had to be a side hustle video, and by the way, there's one more. The first one is a side hustle using AI. A lot of you guys have asked me for it in my stories. 

There are a lot of tools that can actually help you get there.

Indian mothers put their kids into coaching classes for various things since the start, whether it's sports, studies, extra help with certain subjects, and so on. 

WhatsApp has 500 million users in India, and this side hustle using WhatsApp can save coaching classes 15 to 30 hours of staff time every month. 

@aisensy_official @heyinterakt (i use this for naarica) & WATI 

These workflows can be:

 • Admission bots
 • Free reminders
 • Class schedule broadcast
 • Result announcements
 • Study material sharing 

All you gotta do is learn the tool and build your demo, and then find clients. The how is in my Notion.

The checklist and to-do list for you to launch this is also in the Notion. 

I hope you enjoyed this.

.
.
.

[Reels, Explore, Trending, Trending Audio, New Creator, Business Ideas, Easy Side Hustle, Easy Business That Makes Money, Money Mindset, Financial Freedom, Make Me Rich, AI, AI Tools, AI Side Hustle]

Give away alert! Just comment 'rich' to participate, and even if you don't win, you will win all the links to the resources mentioned in the video. 

For the longest time, I was gatekeeping all these resources that can uplift your business sense, money mindset, and your growth. 

And now they are out for you to consume and grow your own wealth mindset as well as business or work that you do. 

I complete exactly one month tomorrow of posting consistently on this page, and the least I could do is gift you all something. 

Here are the rules of the giveaway:

items.caption_text:
In fact, I am lucky that I found you. Allow me to re-introduce or introduce myself. 

I am Shruti, a financial markets graduate who almost did not apply finance in her own life till she turned 25. I have lived in two countries, worked at six companies, and I am still figuring out the last leg of my 20s before I turn 30 in September. 

2026 seems like the year that I've been waiting for. I started my content journey 28 days ago exactly, and I have managed to find 60,000 friends through it. 

Instagram has allowed me to share stuff about money mindset that I talk to my friends about and now to y'all about. 

This is a trial reel, and I hope to reach as many of you as possible because podcasts have changed my life. If it can change yours too, I want nothing more. 

I share resources that are books, Notion creations by me, calculators, money mindset, gyan, some business ideas as well, from time to time. 

I hope you enjoy what I create. 

[Reels, Explore, Trending, Trending Audio, Investments, Money Mindset, Podcast, Binge Watcher, Netflix, YouTube] 

#podcast #moneymindset #investment

items.caption_text:
All the links (25+ resources) in my notion page - comment “finance” & it’s yours ✨

the way to get educated about investing. At least I did it this way. There is a plethora of YouTubers, podcasters, and books that are written on this topic, so you don't need an expert to tell you what to do. 

I was 23 when I started this process and 24 when I made my first investment. I started with investing 85% of my entire salary. 

It was covered, and I had no expenses. I mean, I did have it, but my parents were bearing it for me. So without any rent, without any external expenses, no dinners, no lunches, I had all of it to invest on the stock market.

Luckily for me, the market was really down at that point because it was COVID. Luckily for you, it's still down because of the world crisis. Any market goes through this circle, and this is the best opportunity for you to grab.

[Reels, explore, financial literacy, investments, finfluencer, content creator, new account, new content creator]
